title: How to connect my app to the Monday.com workflow/structure
excerpt: I am trying to build on top of Monday for the hackaton. I would like to work with the CRM. But how do I connect to a sales rep list? Do I make a default sales rep list to start from? I am unsure of the workflow here. I h…

posts.author: Harry_X (Harald Carlsten)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to build on top of Monday for the hackaton. I would like to work with the CRM. But how do I connect to a sales rep list? Do I make a default sales rep list to start from? I am unsure of the workflow here. I have an idea of a few views and a flow in my app. I don’t really understand how to connect it to the app in general.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Harry_X - combining both threads on here.

Are you looking to plug into our API, or creating a custom application with our SDK?

-Daniel

posts.author: Harry_X (Harald Carlsten)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi dsilva! I am using the SDK to make a custom application to work in the CRM set up. I just want to know how I hook it up to Monday’s workflow. Thank you for your time!

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Harry_X - all information regarding our apps and integrations are available through our documentation. I personally recommend starting with the quickstart guides listed there to get an idea of how these apps integrate with monday.

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
